title: poa oblonga
intro: Poa oblonga, also known as Poa bulbosa, is a type of plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa oblonga are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Poa oblonga can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal effects.
